intended_use: QyScore is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to referenc
intended_use_full: QyScore is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to reference percentile data. QyScore is not intended for use in clinical scenarios that require evaluation of the number of the white matter hyperintensities.
target_condition: brain structural and lesion quantification; white matter hyperintensities
ground_truth: Expert manual segmentations for each segmented structure
other_metrics: Dice coefficients exceed 85% on whole brain regions and are in the range of 75%-85% for subcortical brain structures from 3DT1 MRI scans. Lesion segmentation mean absolute volume difference is 3.34mL across a validation population with lesion loads ranging from 0.09mL to 87.65mL.
